race.description: Picklebet's Get Your Pickle On Hcp (Bm52)
race.comment: MISS HIMALAYA (10) was beaten a whisker in a BM56 at Kyneton four back and while the recent form has not been as compelling, she's been going around in races with more depth than this. KING DE LUNE (2) will find this easier than the two runs back and draws to play a key role. ALESUND (1) is another whose figure-form reads terribly but has been competing in tougher races than this, but he's got a poor gate to contend with. MISHIMA (6) has been well below his best of late but backs up quickly here and boasts peaks that measure up. Not dismissing. IL AMERICANA (9) has been thereabouts in her last two and could sneak a minor spot with the right run.
